items.name_en: Top-tier original, comes with full packaging
items.name_cn:
Top-tier original, comes with full packaging
🤟Miss Dior Flap Bag 'Cream Graffiti'
This Miss Dior Flap Bag made its debut at the Dior Fall/Winter 2024 Haute Couture show, reinterpreting the modern elegance of the Dior classic. Crafted from cream white calfskin, paired with a contrasting enamel metal plate featuring the classic Miss Dior Graffiti pattern, showcasing enduring aesthetics. The main compartment under the flap features a zip pocket for organizing daily essentials. With an adjustable strap, it can be worn over the shoulder for a high-fashion look.
Main material: Calfskin
Lining: Calfskin
Enamel Miss Dior Graffiti plate
Magnetic flap closure
Adjustable leather shoulder strap
Internal compartment
Internal zip pocket and slip pocket
Model: 2610
Dimensions: 22 x 11 x 6 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 wallet, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
Top-tier original factory, complete packaging
❤️mini size
This DioGroove 20 handbag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from black calfskin with a quilted oversized houndstooth pattern, showcasing Dio's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key charm features the Christian DioParis logo and is accented with gold-finished stars, unique and distinctive. The key charm opens the zip lock. The spacious compartment features a slip pocket and a zip pocket for daily essentials. Equipped with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal handbag for daily looks.
Model:8808
Dimensions:16.5 x 10x 8cm (L x H x W)
